changelog:
v1.9.2: Fix HTTP 429 rate limit handling with exponential backoff
- Them phan biet loi rate limit (HTTP 429) trong fb_web_api.py
- Ap dung exponential backoff (3s, 8s, 15s) khi gap rate limit thay vi fixed 1s delay
- Gioi han toi da 3 lan retry khi bi rate limit, sau do dung va log ro rang
- Cac loi khong phai 429 giu nguyen hanh vi retry cu
